_meta.author: Peter Higgins
_meta.purpose: Machine-readable entry point for all systems interacting with the Hˢ repository. Read this file first. It provides: identity, navigation, protocol, governance, and authority resolution.
_meta.read_order: This file → HS_ADMIN.json → experiment results → reference standards → archive
_meta.authority: When this file disagrees with any other file, this file wins on structure and navigation. When experimental results disagree with reference standards, the reference standards win until regression testing validates the new results across the full experiment chain.

identity.name: Higgins Decomposition
identity.one_sentence: A deterministic compositional inference instrument that reads the geometric fingerprint of any system on the simplex without creating or destroying structure.
identity.closing_statement: The instrument reads. The expert decides. The loop stays open.
identity.scale_range: 10⁻¹⁸ m to 10²⁶ m (44 orders of magnitude)

navigation._note: All paths are relative to repository root.

pipeline.entry_point: from higgins_decomposition_12step import HigginsDecomposition; hd = HigginsDecomposition(id, name, domain, carriers); hd.load_data(matrix); result = hd.run_full_extended()

onboarding_sequence: 5. Run a reference standard to verify the pipeline works
6. Compare your DUT results against the reference library

terminology_gate.rule: Check canonical_names and communication_standards before generating any text. If a term appears in a NOT list, do not use it.

claim_tiers: core_science — primary Hˢ scientific content (proven or strongly evidenced)
validated_companion — strong secondary instrument or descriptor
engineering_control — integrity, release, regression, operating-envelope layer
conference_safe — suitable for CoDa/math audience with minimal editing
point_of_interest — noteworthy finding, not yet promoted to core
archived — superseded, retired, or historical (preserved, not active)

feed_forward_model.P_proportional: Mainstream pipeline and active experiments. Responds to current findings.
feed_forward_model.I_integral: Archive of all past experiments, methods, and decisions. JSON snapshots. Never deleted. Provides long-term stability.
feed_forward_model.D_derivative: Waypoint system in EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md. Declares position, target, gate, drift boundary.
feed_forward_model.FF_feed_forward: New information is forward-biased. Diagnosed for current use. Historical data checked but not privileged.

authority_stack: 3. Reference standard library — calibration values and thresholds
4. Accumulated experiment results — validated chain of evidence
5. Individual experiment results — newest, lowest authority until regression-tested
6. Archive — historical context, not active authority

conflict_resolution.rule: When sources disagree, higher-numbered authority yields to lower-numbered. Exception: a consistent pattern of new results that survives full regression testing (HIVP chain) can update any authority level. The pattern must be documented in EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md before the update takes effect.
conflict_resolution.example: If a new experiment contradicts the reference standards, the reference standards win until the new result is replicated, regression-tested, and documented. If the new result survives, the reference standards are updated and the old values are archived.

acceptance_criteria: Pass all 4 input guards (D≥2, N≥5, no NaN/Inf, scale sanity)
Produce a valid extended pipeline run (no crashes, all codes emitted)
Document with full diagnostic codes and claim tier assignment
Compare against reference standard library (position relative to ceiling, floor, physical standard)
Survive regression against existing experiments (HIVP chain principle)
Meet communication standards (terminology, tone, language, content labels)

archive_protocol.trigger: Content is archived when superseded, retired, or no longer actively referenced.
archive_protocol.format: JSON snapshot with timestamp, reason, and pointer to replacement.
archive_protocol.retention: Permanent. Archive is the integral term — it provides stability.
archive_protocol.refresh: Full archive review included in every major waypoint.

waypoint_protocol.requirement: Every waypoint in EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md must declare:
fields: next_waypoint — what the next target is (future)
gate_conditions — what must be true to advance
drift_boundary — what would constitute deviation from trajectory

api._note: Minimal programmatic interface for any system to use Hˢ.

run_experiment.codes: from hs_codes import generate_codes; codes = generate_codes(result)
run_experiment.report: from hs_reporter import report; text = report(codes, lang='en')
run_experiment.report_all: from hs_reporter import report_all_languages; all_reports = report_all_languages(codes)
run_experiment.metrology: from hs_metrology import run_full_metrology; report = run_full_metrology()

quick_test.description: Verify pipeline is working by running a reference standard.
quick_test.code: import numpy as np; data = np.array([[0.5,0.3,0.2],[0.4,0.4,0.2],[0.3,0.5,0.2],[0.45,0.35,0.2],[0.35,0.45,0.2]]); hd = HigginsDecomposition('TEST','Quick Test','TEST',carriers=['A','B','C']); hd.load_data(data); r = hd.run_full_extended(); print(r['extended']['universal']['claim_status'])

lineage.engineering_ancestry: Rogue Wave Audio DADC-DADI-ADAC loudspeaker diffraction correction chain (2024-2025)
lineage.mathematical_foundation: Aitchison (1982/1986) simplex geometry, Shannon (1948) entropy, Varley (2025) information theory for complex systems
lineage.separation_reason: Hˢ matured into a standalone mathematical instrument. HUF-GOV remains as the governance, application, and historical development sibling.
